  val m = waterStartTime.length

  for (i <- 0 until n) {
    for (j <- 0 until m) {
      val landStart = landStartTime(i)
      val landEnd = landStart + landDuration(i)
      val waterStart = max(waterStartTime(j), landEnd)

      val landEnd2 = landStart2 + landDuration(i)
      val option2 = landEnd2

      val currentMin = min(option1, option2)
      if (currentMin < minTime) {

  }

  minTime
}
